productName: Mack's GAK ( I ) - Plaid Jacket BHO Elevated THC Cured Resin Cart 1g
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Mack's Gak oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Flavor on the go, a sweet, citrus-earthy, creamy aroma with a balanced, euphoric feel, leading into a balanced head-and-body experience.
